source: IMF PortWatch (Daily_Chokepoints_Data, portid=chokepoint6, Strait of Hormuz)
note: Fallback seed (sparse real anchors). Live /api/hormuz full series takes precedence; this is used only when the API is unreachable. n_total = AIS daily transit calls. Pre-crisis baseline ~94/day. AIS spoofing/dark vessels may undercount.
